productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Splash Black Green Flip Flops
description: This energetic pair of Splash flip-flops from puma are great for casual wear. The straps coupled with a designed footbed in the same combination along with a tinge of white adds up for maximum impact. The circular grooves on the outsole offer grippy support, making this pair perfect for the pool side and the beach. Team it with jeans and tees from myntra for that casual look.UpperQuick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feetThong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and styleMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfortBrand name printed on the footbed for styleOutsoleTPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
